obtainMethods.sellback: 113 Dragon Coins before 24 hours, 32 Dragon Coins after 24 hours

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Darkness damage. (Rate: 50%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2

name: Ancestral Boar Spirit
description: This pet has been granted to the ninjas of the Shadow of the Wind Clan by Nago, the boar god. It represents a fierce nature, strong spirit and breath as fresh as a summer ham.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs up and rams its head into the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Bacon damage

name: Ancestral Snake Spirit
description: This spiritual serpent has been granted to members of the Shadow of the Wind Clan. It represents the ability to free yourself from any situation, as a snake escapes its own skin.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Flies up to the enemy and breaths fire out of its mouth for 1 hit of Melee Wind damage

name: Ancient Ninja Terrapin
description: This pet requires a Dragon Amulet. This rare fresh water turtle has, through some magical accident been transformed into an elderly fighting machine, with a bad attitude. He's old enough to know a snap kick from a snapping turtle.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes two blades and hits for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes a star and throws it at the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy, unsheathes a whip and strikes it at the enemy for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Runs to the enemy and kicks them for one hit of 100% Melee Nature damage

name: Aquella (1)
notes: Aquella will announce how much HP she has left with her turn; if Aquella dies, the battle against Captain Davey will automatically be lost. • DemonicDarkwraith -- 6/14/2026 7:42:36  >

name: Atgasedd Doll
description: Are you feeling it? Buffs you and debuffs enemies, scaling a small amount off of your CHA stat.

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 1  Condensed C Blob & 1  Glob of Unigedd

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a red glow, applying 'Atgasedd' (+X% Boost) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a yellow glow, applying 'Atgno' (+2X Bonus) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a blue glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Bradychwyd' (-2X Bonus) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a green glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Mwrn' (-X% Boost) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 5
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a purple glow, applying 'Unigedd' (+X Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 2 turns.

notes: X is equal to [5 + (Player's CHA)/40], rounded up. • Atgasedd Doll's damage is affected by the global CHA damage buff, increasing its damage by [(Player's CHA)/10], rounded down. • Atgasedd Doll's attack rotation always follows and repeats the above cycle; re-equipping Atgasedd Doll will not reset its rotation. • Silver for image. • Jay for attack type images and corrections. • BluuHorseOfficial for original entry and other information. • Baron Dante and LouisCyphere for CHA formula information. • AstralCodex and Solanaceae for corrections. • DemonicDarkwraith -- 2/15/2024 21:11:17  >
